overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character exploring an abandoned snowy settlement. The character exits a wooden cabin, walks through snow-covered terrain, passes through a ruined wooden structure, and approaches a stone church with an adjacent graveyard. The scene features bright winter sunlight and heavy snow coverage throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden cabin interior with shelves and debris

events.description: character opens wooden door and steps outside into bright snow
transition from dim interior to bright natural sunlight reflecting off snow

agents.ego_description: walking toward the cabin door, opening it, and stepping out into the bright snowy exterior

entered.detail: rough-hewn wooden log walls of the interior cabin
wooden shelving unit with various items
window with fabric curtains allowing some light
wooden plank door with light visible through the gaps
wall-mounted lantern providing interior light

segments.scene_description: Inside a dimly lit wooden cabin, the character walks toward the front door. The interior features wooden walls, shelves with items, and a window with curtains. Around 5 seconds, the character opens the door and steps out, transitioning from the dark interior to the bright snowy exterior.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow field with abandoned wooden structures

agents.ego_description: walking through deep snow toward a large ruined wooden building in the distance

entered.detail: deep snow covering the ground with footprints
large collapsed wooden structure with broken roof beams
evergreen trees heavy with snow
snow-capped mountains in the background
weathered wooden fence posts in the snow

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a vast snow-covered landscape with bright sunlight reflecting off the white ground. A large ruined wooden building stands ahead, surrounded by snow-laden pine trees and distant mountains. The character steadily approaches the ruin.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior of ruined wooden structure with exposed beams

events.description: entering the skeletal frame of the ruined wooden building
exiting the ruin through the far doorway back into open snow

agents.ego_description: walking through the skeletal frame of a ruined wooden building, passing under beams and icicles

entered.detail: long icicles hanging from wooden roof beams
small evergreen tree growing inside the ruin
collapsed wooden wall section with gaps
exposed structural beams of the ruined roof

segments.scene_description: Walking through the open frame of a ruined wooden structure, sunlight streams through the roof beams creating dramatic lighting. Icicles hang from the wooden lintels and small pine trees grow inside the ruin. The character passes through the doorway on the far side around 35 seconds.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy approach to stone church with mist

agents.ego_description: walking toward a stone church building with mist rising from the snow

entered.detail: stone chapel with steep roof and arched windows
low-lying fog and mist in the distance
small wooden building in the far distance

segments.scene_description: Exiting the ruin, the character approaches a stone church with a steep roof in an open snowy field. Mist rises from the ground in the distance, and wooden fences line the path. The mountains become visible again in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: graveyard beside stone church with tombstones

agents.ego_description: walking through the snow-covered graveyard, passing gravestones and wooden crosses beside the church

entered.detail: snow-covered tombstones and grave markers
simple wooden crosses marking graves
stone wall of the church building
leafless trees in the graveyard

segments.scene_description: The character explores a small graveyard adjacent to the stone church, walking past snow-covered gravestones and wooden crosses. The sun creates a bright halo effect behind the church steeple, and bare trees stand among the burial markers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dim interior of a rustic cabin into a vast, sun-drenched winter wilderness. It begins inside a dimly lit wooden room, moving toward the front door before stepping out into a blindingly bright, snow-covered landscape. As the character advances across the white terrain toward distant mountains, the camera passes through the skeletal frame of a ruined wooden building where sunlight streams through roof beams and icicles hang from the lintels. The scene then opens up into a wide field as the character exits the ruin and approaches a stone church with a steep roof and rising ground mist. Finally, the movement shifts toward an adjacent graveyard, gliding past snow-covered crosses and bare trees while the sun creates a bright halo behind the church steeple.
